name: sameer-automations-brand-manifest
description: Single source of truth for video editing. Read this before generating any Remotion / Hyperframe component. Every color, font, and overlay used in a Sameer Automations Reel MUST resolve to a token in this file.

reel._comment: IG chrome eats these regions. Never place legible content here.

talkingHead._comment: Sameer's standard framing — close-up, face fills top ~60% of frame, torso/hands bottom ~35%. Overlays MUST avoid the face zone (top 250 → bottom 1280). Use only the lowerStrip and side rails.

faceBoxApprox._use: DO NOT place overlays here. The face is the content.

lowerStrip._use: name lower-third, captions, single-line stat — narrow band BELOW chest line so face stays clear. Top edge sits below shoulders at y≈1220.

leftGutter._use: vertical-gradient gutter for NumberedList / SystemDiagram. Only dims the strip behind the overlay, not the face.

topChapterStrip._use: chapter / section pills. Sits ABOVE the face, in the IG safe-zone padding.

colors._rule: Use ONLY these tokens. Do not invent hex values. Use the named token in components.

accent._rule: Per-overlay accent — pick ONE per shot. Rotate across a Reel for rhythm. Never two saturated overlays on screen at the same time.

overlayScrim._comment: RGBA scrims that sit between the talking head and overlays so type stays legible.

type._rule: Two families only. Never substitute. Both are loaded from /fonts/ via the @font-face block in /reels/fonts.css.

display.name: Roc Grotesk Wide
display._use: All display headings, stat numerals, chapter titles. Tracking: -0.025em at display scale, -0.012em at body-display scale.

mono.name: JetBrains Mono
mono._use: All eyebrows, timecodes, mono rails. Always uppercase, letter-spacing 0.14em.

motion._rule: Mixed personality: snappy for stats/numbers, soft for words. Never both within the same overlay.

soft_in._use: Lower-third, quote pull, list items, chapter cards

rail_wipe._use: Mono rail extending under a label or stat

captions._rule: Auto-captions match the brand body type. Word-by-word emphasis allowed: when the speaker hits a noun like 'automation' or a number, that word switches to the per-shot accent color and bumps to weight 800.

emphasis._rule: Up to 1 word per caption may be emphasized.

position._comment: Sits ABOVE the IG bottom safe-zone (430px) with 50px breathing room.

overlays._rule: Every overlay component lives in /reels/components/. Filename must match the component name. Anchors must avoid the faceBoxApprox region — keep the talking head clear.

registry._use: Name + handle / topic strip. Sits in the bottom 240px band below chest line so face stays clear. Single-line title preferred.
Burned-in captions. Anchored at y=1500 (above chest, below mouth) so they don't overlap the speaking face.
Side-anchored vertical list with localized gradient scrim that fades into the face — only dims the gutter, not the head.
Optional top-of-frame chapter marker, e.g. '02 · The 5 plays'. Lives in the IG top-chrome safe zone so it never touches the face.

assetPaths._rule: These are the only paths Claude Code is allowed to read from when generating a Reel.

colorOps: raw hex codes outside this manifest
patterns: two saturated overlay colors at once
gradient text + colored highlight on the same line
emoji as graphic elements (use arch-nodes or icons)
